title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Shaadi.com
jsonLd.description:
Join the Shaadi.com family as a Software Engineer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Shaadi.com:
Shaadi.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
